best_matches.title: JUNIOR FULL STACK WEB DEVELOPER
best_matches.reasoning: The candidate has a good foundational skill set that aligns with the job description, particularly in JavaScript and full-stack development. However, the required experience level (1-4 years) is slightly higher than what can be inferred from the candidate's current profile (internship).
best_matches.improvement_tips: Highlight any specific projects or contributions during the internship that demonstrate debugging, unit testing, or troubleshooting skills. If possible, gain some exposure to jQuery and PostgreSQL to strengthen the application.
